CustomField.description: It shows the total of all related MR overpayment distributions amount on the credit memo. [LOAD:No] [JUSTIFICATION:No need to load as this is a rollup summary field] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API:NA] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API:NA] [COMMENTS:NA]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: It shows the total of all related MR overpayment distributions amount on the credit memo.
CustomField.label: Total Distribution Amount
